metadata.description: Open-source Claude Code skill marketplace. Plugins ground software engineering knowledge from canonical books into composable skills.

plugins.name: ddd-core
plugins.description: Language-agnostic Domain-Driven Design skills: mode entry points (design, review, refactor, implement) and pattern primitives (bounded context, aggregate, value object, domain event, …).

plugins.name: ddd-kotlin
plugins.description: Kotlin idiom adapter for ddd-core. Maps DDD pattern decisions to idiomatic Kotlin (data/value/sealed classes, Result, Spring, Arrow).

plugins.name: design-patterns-core
plugins.description: Language-agnostic Gang-of-Four design patterns: three mode entry points (identify, review, refactor-to-pattern) and seventeen pattern primitives — Strategy, Observer, Decorator, Factory, Singleton, Command, Adapter, Facade, Template Method, Iterator, Composite, State, Proxy, plus Builder, Prototype, Bridge, Visitor.

plugins.name: design-patterns-kotlin
plugins.description: Kotlin idiom adapter for design-patterns-core. Maps each of the seventeen GoF patterns to its idiomatic Kotlin treatment, with explicit callouts where language features (object, sealed classes, by-delegation, function types, named/default arguments, data class copy, scope functions) supersede the pattern.

plugins.name: kotlin-patterns
plugins.description: Kotlin-specific patterns that aren't GoF: pattern matching with sealed + when, higher-order functions, Coroutines patterns (scope, launch vs async, dispatchers, structured concurrency, channels, select, actor pattern, testing, callback bridging), Flow patterns (cold vs hot, operators), type-safe DSL builders, and a Kotlin anti-pattern catalog. Grounded in Soshin's *Kotlin Design Patterns and Best Practices* and Moskala's *Kotlin Coroutines*.

plugins.name: architecture-patterns
plugins.description: Language-agnostic software architecture patterns: macro styles (layered, hexagonal, event-driven, microservices), cross-cutting patterns (CQRS, event sourcing, saga, circuit breaker), migration / governance (strangler fig, fitness functions, architecture decision records), and SOLID principles.

plugins.name: tdd-patterns
plugins.description: Test-driven development techniques grounded in Kent Beck's *Test-Driven Development By Example*. Process patterns (fake-it, triangulate, obvious implementation, one-step test, child test), test design patterns (isolation, mocks, learning tests, regression tests), and a TDD anti-pattern catalog. The 'how' of TDD, not the 'whether'.
